rulings.Case Title: CONS. OF ROBERTO T. REYNA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/23/25. The petition does not appear to be complete or ready to be heard. The ex parte petition to increase bond was just filed on 6/2/25. The supplemental accounting for the period following the date of death was not included (or filed separately yet). The bank statements filed on 5/6/25 do not appear to be for balances on 3/16/23 (beginning of the accounting period) and 10/1/24 (end of the accounting period). A copy of Letters issued to the personal representative of the deceased conservatee's estate, certified within 60 days, must be filed. The accounting and attorney fees have not yet been fully reviewed. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF SOFIA Y. NUNEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the judicial officer to review and determine whether to issue an order, on the Court's own motion, suspending petitioner's powers as guardian in light of her resignation and appointing the proposed successor guardian as temporary guardian to secure the estate funds and investigate each transaction that took place after the end of this account period in May 2024, as no one has petitioned ex parte to establish a temporary guardianship. See Probate Code section 2250(i) and (j) and section 2654. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BEATRIZ QUITOLES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/22/25. Examiner Notes sent to counsel with the following issues: 1) $2,258.80 was paid to attorney for "expense reimbursement". The expenses must be itemized. 2) Ending balance of cash (showing the end of account date) must be verified [Local Rule 14.34D]. Please also make sure to file a verified declaration pursuant to Local Rule 14.59A certifying that the original document(s) will be available for inspection in the same way as documents are maintained under CRC 2.257.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of Appointment Of Personal Representative Or 13100 Affidavit
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/6/25. No response to issues posted for the prior hearing. A Court-appointed fiduciary must supplement or amend her/his/their own pleading(s), not the attorney. [Probate Code Section 1023 and CRC 7.103(c).] If nothing is filed by 7/23/25 (proof of appointment of a personal representative for the estate of Ann Prochnow and/or the executor's verification of her attorney "status report" filed on 4/17/25 or her own, current report on the status of Ann Prochnow's estate), an appearance will likely be required on 8/6/25.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issue (initially e-mailed to petitioner on 01/06/2025 & posted as tentative rulings for subsequent hearings) remains unaddressed: No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ENDIA MAE GROSS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed at hearing: 1) Both mailed and written notice incorrectly state that the petition requests Pamela D. Pujo be appointed personal representative of the estate. The named personal representative in the petition is Juanita Gross (Probate Code Sections 8100 and 8120). 2) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
